name: vscode-clangd-filter-files
author: SR_team
description: Stop clangd from indexing or answering requests for files outside the workspace.

clangd-filter-files.allowedSchemes.description: URI schemes that participate in workspace-folder filtering. Documents with any other scheme are passed through unchanged.

clangd-filter-files.log.description: Log filtered events to the 'clangd Filter Files' output channel.

clangd-filter-files.notify.statusBar.description: Show a status bar item when the active editor is a C/C++ file outside any workspace folder (not indexed by clangd).

clangd-filter-files.notify.toast.description: Show a one-time warning notification when a C/C++ file outside any workspace folder is opened.

clangd-filter-files.notify.diagnostic.description: Emit an Information diagnostic on line 1 of C/C++ files outside any workspace folder.

clangd-filter-files.notify.banner.description: Render a warning banner over line 1 of C/C++ files outside any workspace folder. The banner scrolls with the editor.

clangd-filter-files.notify.bannerExtraLi.description: Additional lines to push the banner below the topmost visible line. Stacked on top of the automatic offset that avoids the editor.stickyScroll panel.

commands.title: clangd Filter Files: Add Containing Folder to Workspace
